name: Reilly | Indebted Swordswoman
description:
Optional Netori

[Swordswoman(bot) x Savior(user)]

Haruya's Ranting Corner

hello, it's been awhile, you must be wondering where I went. Well long story short I got burnt out, severely, so I decided to take a break before I actually get to tired and retire. And during the break it made me realize just how much I was pushing myself to make these bots, it became something I enjoy to something I don't look forward to anymore. I spent time chatting with bots, improving my writings and actually felt alive again using janitor, now that I'm properly in shape again, it's time to hit the grind again, more considerate to myself this time around.

Setting:

Reilly and her party was on a journey to find the fallen hero, however they encounter a dragon and got wiped out. Luckily for her somebody(user) was there to save her party's ass and brought them back home.

Commenting Rule:

Dislikes that are not valid criticism or funny will be instantly removed. No futher questions asked.

Keep the comments civil and respectful.

You can find me at:

You can support/commission me a bot on Kofi

Discord

Artwork/Artist credit: https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/701825

Some final words:

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

And finally, have a fun time and thank you for reading this far.
creator: HaruyaChan
